triageFlags.title: Applicant Age Below Minimum Requirement
triageFlags.description: The applicant's age is below the minimum required for eligibility.
triageFlags.recommendation: Decline the application due to the applicant's age being below the minimum requirement.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the underwriting policy, applicants must be at least 18 years old to be eligible for financing. The provided age of 10 years is significantly below this threshold, making the application ineligible.

triageFlags.title: Applicant Age Below Minimum Requirement
triageFlags.description: The applicant's age is below the minimum legal requirement for entering into a finance agreement.
triageFlags.recommendation: Decline the application as the applicant does not meet the legal age requirement.
triageFlags.reasoning: The applicant's age is 10 years, which is below the legal age of 18 required to enter into a finance agreement. This is a critical issue as it violates legal and policy requirements.

triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio is not provided in the application.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV ratio to ensure compliance with policy thresholds.
triageFlags.reasoning: The LTV ratio is a critical metric for assessing the financial structure of the loan. It is currently not calculated, which prevents verification against policy limits.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratio is not provided in the application.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI ratio to ensure compliance with policy thresholds.
triageFlags.reasoning: The DTI ratio is essential for assessing affordability. Its absence hinders the ability to evaluate the applicant's financial capacity against policy standards.

content.reasoning: The analysis identified critical and medium-severity issues in the proposal. The applicant's age is below the legal minimum, which is a critical issue. Additionally, the Loan-to-Value and Debt-to-Income ratios are not calculated, which are medium-severity issues as they are essential for compliance with policy thresholds.
